calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Blacksburg for and with Robert Lanning (Personal Representative).

Mr. Blacksburg stated that Mr. Lanning is the sole beneficiary, that the main asset of the estate was a family home which was sold and that the money was put in the bank. Mr. Blacksburg also stated that Mr. Lanning thought it was his money, that Mr. Lanning used some of the money to buy a car and move, and that there was no conversation about it. The petition for final distribution was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Leonardini. (Not Reported)
